element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Combination-based attack variety unlocked through orb collection
Puzzle solving and combat enhancement through equipment
Exploration of 'large game world' with interconnected lands
Central to navigating dungeons and world progression
Culminating challenge against dark elf wizard's minions

typical_tension_triggers: Navigation of large world without guidance
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Long, involved progression with exploration punctuated by combat and puzzle-solving encounters; described as 'massive length' providing sustained engagement

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory combat and basic puzzle mechanics taught through controlled castle setting
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased complexity of puzzle-solving and varied enemy encounters across multiple lands
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters with Pazort's followers demanding mastery of orb-item combination system
notable_spikes: Transition from castle to open world exploration

notable_level_patterns.description: Large interconnected world with multiple discrete regions (lands) accessible from central progression; player navigates between exploration zones and returns to advance story
Puzzles serve as primary gate mechanism for world navigation and story advancement, requiring acquired items and orbs to solve
Mars (protagonist) travels alone through world; contrasts with series tradition of multi-character parties but provides focused narrative through solo action-adventure lens
